ok 1 - clean edit on fresh base passes
ok 2 - stale-tree clobber fails; stale-base-ack overrides loudly
ok 3 - heal PR (restore past a clobber) passes
ok 4 - deletion-only PR passes with a notice
ok 5 - byte-identical re-add of a deleted file passes
ok 6 - staleness backstop (commits) fails; ack overrides
ok 7 - staleness backstop (hours) fails
ok 8 - --window bounds how far back reverts are detected
ok 9 - missing merge-base fails as severe staleness; ack overrides
stale-base-guard self-test: 9/9 passed
